response.justification: Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with proven leadership across multiple staff roles and demonstrated ability to ship systemic solutions at scale (millions of requests at Dunnhumby, multi-team coordination). However, the resume shows zero specialization in experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, metrics/telemetry systems, or data analysis—all core to this Principal-level growth engineering role. While foundational skills are strong, the absence of domain-specific expertise represents significant ramp-up risk for a role requiring deep experimentation platform experience from day one.
strengths: Proven technical leadership: Multiple staff-level roles with demonstrated ability to architect solutions, mentor engineers, and coordinate across teams and products

Scale and systems experience: Worked on infrastructure handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby; built distributed systems across multiple companies; comfortable with production services at enterprise scale

Broad technical foundation: 16+ years across web, mobile, embedded systems; proficient in required languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript); recent hands-on work with AI infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: No experimentation platform expertise: Zero demonstrated experience building A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or experimentation infrastructure—core to this role's responsibilities

Missing metrics and data aptitude: No evidence of telemetry design, data analysis, statistical methods, or metrics infrastructure work—explicitly required for the Principal-level growth engineering position

Generalist career trajectory: Frequent role/company changes across diverse domains (web, GIS, robotics, finance, direct mail) with no sustained focus on growth, experimentation, or measurement systems that would signal deep domain fit

key_factors.factor: Strong systems engineering and leadership foundation
Recent AI and infrastructure work demonstrates modern tech aptitude
